mapper.sql: id, user_id, exam_id, score, total_score, pass_score, is_pass, duration, submit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_exam_record (user_id, exam_id, score, total_score, pass_score, is_pass, duration, submit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{examId}, #{score}, #{totalScore}, #{passScore}, #{isPass}, #{duration}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_exam_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY submit_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_exam_record SET deleted = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_id = #{examId} AND deleted = 0
